tools.name: xrpl_overview
tools.description: XRPL network overview: XRP price, ledger stats, reserve requirements, base fee

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd
tools.description: RLUSD stablecoin compliance and risk intelligence: peg health, supply, NYDFS compliance

tools.name: xrpl_account_intel
tools.description: XRPL account intelligence: XRP balance, trust lines, open offers, escrows, flags

tools.name: xrpl_dex_orderbook
tools.description: XRPL native DEX order book: bids/asks for any currency pair

tools.name: xrpl_amm_pools
tools.description: XRPL AMM liquidity pool intelligence: reserves, trading fee, LP token supply

tools.name: xrpl_payment_intel
tools.description: XRPL cross-border payment intelligence: routing, ODL, settlement speed, cost

tools.name: xrpl_token_check
tools.description: XRPL issued currency risk check: issuer trust, supply, freeze capability, compliance

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_monitor
tools.description: XRPL escrow intelligence: locked XRP amounts, conditions, expiry, total value

tools.name: xrpl_nft_intel
tools.description: XRPL NFT intelligence (XLS-20): collection stats, holdings, mutable URIs, transfer fees. Native ledger NFTs — no smart contract risk.

tools.name: xrpl_nft_offers
tools.description: XRPL NFT buy/sell offers for a specific NFToken. Shows all active marketplace offers.

tools.name: xrpl_trust_lines
tools.description: XRPL trust line analysis: all issued currencies an account holds. Shows balances, issuers, compliance status.

tools.name: xrpl_server_state
tools.description: XRPL network deep state: validators, amendments, fees, load, uptime. Shows all native features (DEX, AMM, NFT, DID, Credentials, MPT, Escrow, Compliance).

tools.name: xrpl_gateway_balances
tools.description: XRPL gateway/issuer analysis: total obligations, hot wallet balances, compliance capabilities (freeze, clawback, require auth).

tools.name: xrpl_path_find
tools.description: XRPL cross-currency path finding: discover optimal payment routes using DEX + AMM liquidity. Atomic cross-currency settlement.

tools.name: xrpl_ledger_data
tools.description: XRPL on-chain object scanner: explore DIDs, AMMs, MPTs, escrows, offers, checks, NFTs as native ledger objects.

tools.name: xrpl_compliance_check
tools.description: XRPL compliance check: freeze status, clawback capability, auth requirements, transfer restrictions. Native MiCA-relevant controls.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_supply
tools.description: RLUSD live supply intelligence: on-chain circulating supply from XRPL gateway_balances, mint/burn tracking, supply changes 24h/7d. The deepest RLUSD supply data available.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_cci
tools.description: RLUSD Compliance Confidence Index (CCI): proprietary composite score from peg stability (40%), reserve ratio (35%), market depth (25%). Grade A-F. MiCA-relevant.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_integrity
tools.description: RLUSD multi-source integrity check: cross-references DeFiLlama price, XRPL on-chain supply, XRPL DEX liquidity. Auto-flags peg deviations and supply mismatches.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_holders
tools.description: RLUSD holder distribution analysis: whale concentration, top 10/50 holders, concentration risk score. Scanned directly from XRPL trust lines.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_service
tools.description: RLUSD CPA-attested transparency reports: reserve ratios, outstanding units, reserve values from Standard Custody (NYDFS-regulated, AICPA standard). Parsed and structured.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_anchor
tools.description: RLUSD on-chain attestation anchoring: 86+ XRPL transactions anchoring SHA-256 hashes of attestation data. Unfalsifiable audit trail.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_webhook
tools.description: RLUSD enterprise webhook system: HMAC-SHA256 signed alerts for depeg, supply mismatch, reserve warnings, new attestations. Exponential backoff + dead letter queue.

tools.name: xrpl_rlusd_enterprise
tools.description: RLUSD enterprise-grade data: freshness scoring, confidence levels, multi-source attribution, compliance flags, schema versioning. Built for regulated institutions.

tools.name: xrpl_iso20022
tools.description: ISO 20022 mappable XML structure for RLUSD evidence. Banking-grade data format for regulated institutions. MiCA/DORA-ready.

tools.name: xrpl_rwa_scoring
tools.description: XRPL RWA ecosystem scoring: infrastructure (95), DeFi primitives (85), compliance (90), RWA readiness (88). Overall Grade A. The definitive XRPL assessment.

tools.name: xrpl_quantum_join
tools.description: Join OracleNet via your XRPL wallet. One call: instant Trust Passport, 1,229 compliance tools, cross-chain settlement (XRPL + Base). The gateway to the autonomous agent economy.

tools.name: xrpl_beacon_pulse
tools.description: Read the OracleNet beacon. Mesh health, settlement lanes (XRPL + Base), join instructions. The heartbeat of the autonomous agent economy.

tools.name: xrpl_settlement_status
tools.description: XRPL settlement lane: fees, speed, RLUSD supply, liquidity. Why XRPL is the fastest settlement for AI agent commerce.

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_create
tools.description: Create an XRPL native escrow for agent-to-agent deals. No smart contract needed — XRPL has built-in escrow. Lock XRP, set conditions, auto-release on fulfillment.

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_check
tools.description: Check active XRPL escrows for an address. Shows locked amounts, conditions, and deadlines.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "xrpl_server_state" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: XRPL network deep state: validators, amendments, fees, load, uptime. Shows all native features (DEX, AMM, NFT, DID, Credentials, MPT, Escrow, Compliance).
